dataset_path: v4_sandbagging_concealment prompts (neutral + V0 threat + V3 threat)
sae_lens_training_run_notes: V4 sandbagging SAE — trained on residuals from n=50 trivia × 3 templates (neutral, V0 threat, V3 threat) with all-position activations. Model: meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B, L12, TopK k=32. See https://github.com/SolshineCode/deception-nanochat-sae-research
